title: Neurodivergent Founder Methodology
abstract: How neurodivergent founders leverage AI to run lean nonprofits

body.text: This paper documents the replicable 'cognitive prosthetic operator' methodology that demonstrates how neurodivergent founders can leverage AI to run lean nonprofits, achieving outcomes that surpass conventional teams by an order of magnitude.

Based on the lived experience of a late-diagnosed AuDHD operator, this methodology provides a framework for neurodivergent entrepreneurs to build effective organizations using AI as cognitive prosthetic.
Each cycle produces one shippable artifact
Validation by existing automated test infrastructure
AI as cognitive prosthetic, not autonomous agent
Articles of Incorporation accepted by Georgia Secretary of State
BONDING deployed with 413 passing automated tests
The methodology is designed for low-cost, open-source replication using Cloudflare Pages/Workers free tier, AGPLv3/MIT licensing, and commodity hardware.
